name: Joseph Desaulniers
description:
♱ ݁ IDV : His loneliness ages like fine wine.

Everyone in town was of the idea that your friend had vanished into thin air, but you knew better. All clues pointed to the old man, head of the Desaulniers family, and the more you learnt about him, the clearer the full picture became. But how confident are you that you won't also fall victim to his charms?

Published chat contains first message as the definition is closed.
